subcodes.first_line: O Ali, this name signifieth loftiness and is derived from height and exaltation; therefore have I addressed thee by this name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی این نام بمعنی بلند و مشتق از سمو و علو است لهذا بهمین نام خطاب نمودم
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant
